summary: Remove whereClause/args parameters from tnLoadNotices to eliminate latent SQL-injection surface.
reason: The original generated signature accepted a raw whereClause string that was concatenated directly into the SQL query string. No caller ever passed a non-empty value (all 10 callers passed ""), so the capability was dead but the injection surface remained. Removed the parameters; all callers updated. Post-load filtering in Go already handles every caller's use case.
